ANALYTICS.TITLE: ML Analytics — Isolation Forest
ANALYTICS.SUBTITLE: Real-time performance diagnostics of the anomaly detection model.

CHART.SCORE_DIST_DESC: Distribution of anomaly scores across all logs. Bars in red (≥0.7) are flagged as anomalies by the model.
CHART.FEATURE_RADAR_DESC: Comparison of key HTTP features between normal traffic and detected anomalies, computed from real log data.
CHART.SCATTER_DESC: Each dot is a recent HTTP request plotted by its anomaly score over time. Points above the red line (0.7) are flagged.

CONFUSION.TITLE: Confusion Matrix
CONFUSION.DESC: Performance metrics from the initial model training and validation phase. Shows how well the Isolation Forest algorithm identified threats in the historical dataset before deployment.
CONFUSION.PRECISION_HINT: Of all anomalies flagged during testing, 92.5% were real threats.
CONFUSION.RECALL_HINT: Of all real threats in the dataset, the model successfully caught 97.0%.
CONFUSION.F1_HINT: Harmonic mean of precision and recall, showing strong overall accuracy.
CONFUSION.NOTE: These metrics represent the offline benchmark of the ML model against a labeled dataset to guarantee its reliability in production.

SETTINGS.TITLE: Account Settings
SETTINGS.SUBTITLE: Manage your profile and system preferences.

TFA.TITLE: Two-Factor Authentication
TFA.DESC: Protect your account with an extra security layer.
TFA.STEP1: 1. Scan this QR code with your authenticator app (Google Authenticator, Authy, etc.)
TFA.STEP2: 2. Enter the 6-digit code generated by the app.
TFA.DISABLE_DESC: Enter your current password to confirm disabling 2FA.

SETTINGS.DELETE_DESC: Once you delete your account, there is no going back. Please be certain.
SETTINGS.ARCH_DESC: RiskTrace is built using Angular 18, Spring Boot, and MongoDB. The anomaly detection engine is powered by Python ML microservices using Isolation Forest algorithms.

MODAL_HELP.TITLE: How to Integrate RiskTrace
MODAL_HELP.STEP1_TITLE: Add the script tag to your site
MODAL_HELP.STEP1_DESC: Paste this just before the </body> tag:
MODAL_HELP.STEP2_DESC: The tracker automatically captures page loads, API requests, etc.
MODAL_HELP.STEP3_DESC: Go to Log Explorer in your dashboard.

INTEGRATION.TITLE: Choose your Platform
INTEGRATION.DESC_FRONTEND: Place this script tag in the <head> of your HTML. It automatically tracks page loads, API calls, and JS errors.
INTEGRATION.DESC_NODEJS: Add this middleware to your Express.js or Next.js app. It intercepts all backend requests and reports 4xx/5xx errors.
INTEGRATION.DESC_SPRING: Copy this class into your Spring Boot project (any package). The @Component annotation registers it automatically.
INTEGRATION.DESC_CSHARP: Add this middleware to your ASP.NET Core pipeline in Program.cs using app.UseMiddleware<RiskTraceMiddleware>().
INTEGRATION.DESC_PYTHON: Add this middleware to your FastAPI or Django application. It captures all HTTP errors from your server.
INTEGRATION.DESC_PHP: Register this middleware in your Laravel Kernel.php. It captures 4xx/5xx errors from your Laravel backend.
INTEGRATION.NOTE: This snippet captures backend-side attacks (path scanning, brute force) invisible to the browser tracker.
